evidence_excerpt: Second-look laparoscopy performed nearly 1 year after definitive therapy revealed complete resolution of her disease with no evidence of bowel implants.

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: After the operation, the patient experienced excellent pain relief, and follow-up laparoscopy at ~1 year showed complete resolution.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: Postoperatively the patient had excellent pain relief, and at ~1 year there was no evidence of residual disease.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: After the operation, the patient experienced excellent pain relief.
Nearly 1 year after definitive therapy, second-look laparoscopy showed complete resolution with no bowel implants.

notes_on_uncertainty: Functional capacity beyond pain relief was not explicitly described, and outcomes beyond ~1 year are not provided. Surgery was the initial definitive treatment rather than a re-intervention. The diagnosis date was used as the reference as it directly preceded definitive therapy.
